name: yt-dlp-downloader
description: Download video or audio from a supported URL with yt-dlp.

format.description: Download format selector. Defaults to 'best' for the best available quality. Accepts video+audio combinations or audio-only selectors such as 'bestaudio'.

output_template.description: Output filename template in yt-dlp syntax (for example, '%(title)s.%(ext)s').
